title: Säntis Malt — Legend Barry No.2
notes: Tanijan × Säntis Malt collab; matured in old oak beer casks, finished in wine casks.
comment: Matured in old oak beer casks and finished in wine casks, very special flavor.

title: Glenfarclas 25
notes: Long-aged sherry-cask Speyside; deep oak and dried fruit.
comment: Twenty-five years! It is likely older than I am (well, for sure).

title: Blair Athol 12 — TNT Casks single cask
notes: Refill sherry butt then 1st-fill PX hogshead finish, cask TNT 250002, only 298 bottles.
comment: Single Cask. Only 298 bottles in this batch.

title: Arran 17
notes: Limited edition of 12,000 bottles; sherry-bomb maturation.
comment: Rare batch, only 12,000 bottles released. A total Sherry Bomb!

title: Ardbeg Spectacular (Committee)
notes: Committee release; ex-red-wine casks meet Ardbeg's peat.
comment: Peat Monster!

title: Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve
notes: Smooth, honey-forward blended Scotch.
comment: A reasonably good taste with a moderate price for a blended whisky.

title: Hibiki Japanese Harmony
notes: Suntory's entry Hibiki; floral, mellow, hints of Mizunara.
comment: Exquisite and expensive. It was actually a gift from a friend, and I sincerely thank him for this.

title: Clynelish 14
notes: Iconic Highland waxiness; ex-bourbon cask, slightly briny finish.
comment: A classic Highland style with its distinctive waxy notes and higher ABV.

title: Johnnie Walker 15 Sherry Finish
notes: Blended malt finished in sherry casks; dried fruit & honey.
comment: A sherry-cask finished blend... but I wonder why they made this?

title: Glengoyne 12
notes: Unpeated, partially sherry-matured; toffee apples & citrus.

title: Akashi Blue Label
notes: Eigashima Distillery blend; mild, lightly sherried.
comment: Mild, yet tasty Japanese whisky.

title: Johnnie Walker Aged 18 (ex-Platinum)
notes: Rebrand of Platinum Label; fruity blend with subtle smokiness.
comment: A decent, balanced blended whisky. The bottle itself features a unique design.

title: Fenjiu Qinghua 20 — 汾酒青花20
notes: Classic light-aroma baijiu; sorghum, hint of green apple.
comment: Among all Baijiu, Fenjiu is my favorite. Qinghua 20 is undoubtedly a classic masterpiece. This was also a gift from a good friend.

title: Tobermory Hebridean Gin 1798
notes: Distilled on Tobermory's whisky stills; elderflower, tea, wild heather.
comment: I bought this simply because I love Tobermory's whisky, but this gin turned out to be an excellent spirit as well.

title: Gourmet Berner Absinth
notes: Traditional absinthe with thujone; aniseed and wormwood-herbal.
comment: High ABV with thujone inside. Maybe it causes hallucinations, but I just used it to make a Sazerac. Also a gift from a dear friend in Germany.

title: Deanston 12 Sherry Cask Finish (China Exclusive)
notes: China-exclusive sherry finish; chocolate, orange marmalade, spice.
comment: Standard profile (Honey & Waxy), didn't leave a strong impression on me.

title: Laizhou Finest Select — 崃州甄选
notes: Young Chinese single malt; multi-cask fusion; pear & sponge cake notes.
comment: I bought this to support the domestic whisky industry. The palate is actually quite decent with some complex flavors, comparable to international brands. However, the finish is a bit short and watery—likely due to its young age, which only time can fix.

title: Mysterious Islay 14 — Whiskybroker cask sample
notes: Duty-paid sample, Cask No.84, distilled 2009; explosive peat + sherry.
comment: I managed to get the last 200ml residue from a tasting event. It offers an explosive combination of peat and sherry flavors—pure magic.

title: Tobermory 12
notes: Gently sweet, unpeated, floral — Mull's island character without smoke.
comment: My favorite daily dram. Very balanced flavor and easy to drink, with a friendly price tag.

title: Glencadam Reserva PX
notes: Small batch Pedro Ximénez sherry cask finish; unchillfiltered.

title: Singleton 12 Sumptuous Delight (Glen Ord, Sherry Finish)
notes: Slow-batch distilled; sherry-finished sweet & nutty Singleton.
comment: Another one of my daily dram.

title: Glenmorangie The Original 10
notes: Ex-bourbon casks; smooth, creamy, orange / honey / vanilla / peach.

title: Singleton Golden Autumn Orchard (Glendullan, Double Oak)
notes: Travel-exclusive 1L bottling; bourbon + white oak double-maturation.
comment: Bought from the airport duty-free. I meant to keep it as a gift for friends, but I couldn't help but open it... and finally drank it all.

title: Glendronach 12 (Sherry Cask Matured)
notes: PX + Oloroso sherry-matured; rich, fruity Highland.

title: Arran Quarter Cask "The Bothy" (CS 56.2%)
notes: Natural cask strength quarter-cask matured; tropical fruit, spiced vanilla.
comment: An intense flavor bomb! (Vanilla & Cinnamon)

title: Glenfarclas 12
notes: Entry Glenfarclas; sherry-sweet, dried fruit.
